jobs.title: Manager, Security Engineering
jobs.content: <p><strong>Manager, Security Engineering</strong></p><p>Contentful is the API-first headless-CMS / composable-content platform pioneered around structured-content-as-a-service & the digital-experience-platform segment.</p>

jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer, Studio
jobs.content: <p>Lead Contentful's Studio engineering function across the visual editor / Apps Framework / Live Preview platform.</p>
